feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Priority for source of supply determination
entry.content:
I want to know if possible to configure a rule for prioritizing the source of supply of a purchase requisition. 

1) I have 2 vendors which have source lists, info record but the system proposes both of them in the source of supply. We run MRP and the systema assignes one info record, what is the logic behind the selection?



2) I want when running MRP, there is one being selected over the other one without having to "fix" the vendor in the source list.. is this possible? if I enter a "1" in field MRP in source list, how would the system determine the source of supply then? 

 

Vendor 1 has 16 days delivery time, price for material is 187.68 EUR

Vendor 2 has 10 days planned delivery time and price 188.36 EUR

None of them have and agreement in place.

entry.title: Error message: Log not found (in main memory) while executing program FDM_P2P_AUTO_CONFIRM
entry.content:
Hi,

when i try to execute the program FDM_P2P_AUTO_CONFIRM with a variant, the following error message occurs:

Log not found (in main memory)

Message no. BL207

What can i do here?

entry.title: Err. exécution : RAISE_EXCEPTION - Progr. ABAP : SAPLCOZV
entry.content:
Désignation : Exception condition "DUMP_STATUS_INCONSYSTENCY_FRE" triggered

How avoid these error? notes?

entry.title: Hyper-V virtualization is not supported for SAP systems (On-Prem).
entry.content:
Hi  -

Currently we have Red hat Linux 8.10 OS version for all our SAP systems including Application and HANA Database server. Currently All these servers are using VMware Virtualization and due to costing we are planning to migrate from VMware to Hyper-V. but due to below article , We came to know that Hyper-V virtualization is not supported for SAP systems (On-Prem).

Please suggest the concerns and other alternate options to get rid of VMware.

entry.title: Unable to Generate PDFs in VA22
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

After I have created a quote in VA21 a PDF copy is generated in the attachment list. However, each time I make changes and save the changes to the quote in VA22, a new PDF copy with the changes is not generated, and I have to manually issue the output. How can I set it up to not create new output message, just mark automatically "Change" checkbox in output message view.

Thank you for any suggestions 🙂

BR

entry.title: How to create dynamic graphic images in adobe forms sap abap
entry.content: I want to create a chart graph and pie chart in Adobe Forms with dynamically incoming data as in the example below. I tried to print a chart created with CL_GUI_CHART_ENGINE to Adobe Forms. Has anyone done this before?

entry.title: Autorization object for BP Vendor purchasing organization
entry.content:
The purchasing department users need read (03) access to BP vender info, but only change (02) access to the purchasing tab. Before our S/4 migration, we handled it with the F_LFA1_APP object, activity 01 + 02 for APPKZ = M. But now we can't seem to make it work with the new B_BUPA* autorization objects, or a combination of both.

How do I set this up?

entry.title: MM_EKKO : Unable to archive STO - Error The delivery costs are not cleared for STO
entry.content:
While trying to archive STO type ZUB, getting an error The delivery costs are not cleared for STO in preprocessing step. 

Found the note 334506 - Archiving MM_EKKO: Delivery costs no archiving  relevant for this issue. However, it is not compatible for current system release.

entry.title: Advanced Return Management / Scrapping with movement type 551
entry.content:
Hello all,
we are facing following issue:
One of the logistical follow up activities we want to use is "transfer to scrap". However, the point is we cannot use it, due to some specific characteristics of the movement type 551. It requires a reason code. I would like to change it to the "not mandatory", but we need it for other process.
Question:
There are two possibilities to solve it.
1. We use a copy of the movement type 551 where the reason code isn't mandatory.
Question: Can I change the movement type used for that follow-up activity to another one?
2. There is a field on the material inspection document where I can enter the reason code.
Is it possible to add the field?
Thanks in advance
Vitali

entry.title: Billing doc Creation idoc
entry.content: Billing doc Creation idoc. is there any idoc type that we can use to create Billing documents through Idoc

entry.title: Where to Start Learning for Implementing ERP SAP in a Full-Cycle Production Enterprise?
entry.content:
Hi, 
I'm exploring the process of implementing ERP SAP and would like to understand where to start if the enterprise has a full production cycle - from ore extraction to finished product manufacturing.
Which SAP moduls and solutions should be studied first? I would appreciate any advicce, courses, or materials that can help build a step-b-step learning and preparation plan for the project.
This is a kind of search - a prototype project for implementing ERP SAP in a large enterprise with a full production cycle. I'm open to collaboration and will be happy to share the results and finding of this project. I belive this research could be valuable for other professionals involved in SAP implementation in industrial enterprise.
P.S. It would be better if there are materials available in Russian.
Looking forward to your insight and suggestions, discussions. Thank you for your time.

entry.title: QUEUE_NOT_EMPTY in CHECK_REQUIREMENTS phase in patch updgrade
entry.content: We are getting the error QUEUE_NOT_EMPTY in CHECK_REQUIREMENTS phase in SPAM upgrade.

entry.title: Excel Template for Specification Management - EHS_SPEC_EXCEL.xls
entry.content: With the note 2594418 you could download a current Excel template for EHS specification management (EHS-BD-SPE). This has expired in 02 2025, is there a new current template with the currently valid certificate?

entry.title: Benefit Insurance- include previous year's earnings for Insurance coverage calcs.
entry.content:
I have a new requirement to change Short Term Disability Insurance from using BSAL for coverage amount to the total previous years earnings instead.  They are asking for the amount on the W2s, so they are looking at tech WT /301 to be used for coverage amount on the insurance.

Is this configuation possible and what would need to be done?

Thanks

Teresa

entry.title: Dudas generales de como empezar a estudiar SAP
entry.content:
Buenos días me llamo Carlos. Me gustaría empezar a estudiar SAP ERP principalmente 

el tema de logística, almacenes etc.. Me gustaría saber si hay modulos en Español y si los examenes

pueden ser en Español.

Gracias

entry.title: Inspected samples for characteristics are more than fixed scope
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have stuck in one unusual situation. At some point inspected samples for first characteristics changed to 17 however our fixed scope is 13 only. Not sure how this has happened. 

We have maintained fixed scope indicator for this characteristics

We are not using any multiple samples functionality  and sample size is 13 in sampling procedure which is fixed sample. We have inspected 4 batches with same characteristics but it was working fine , Problem occurred when we went to inspect 5th batch.  

Could you please help me resolve this , We want to maintain inspected samples as 13 from 17 . How can it be done

entry.title: How to delete or Change MIC version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is it possible to delete MIC version. For example i have a MIC with two versions. Both versions were created on the same day.

Now i want to delete the version 2 of MIC. Is it possible?

Thanks in advance.

Warm regards

entry.title: Is It Standard Behavior for Zero-Quantity Lines to Appear After Batch Split in Outbound Delivery?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have encountered a situation in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (with EWM) where, after a batch split occurs in an outbound delivery, the original item line remains in the document but with a zero quantity. This happens when:

  • The original item is batch-managed.

  • The system performs automatic batch determination.

  • Multiple batches are assigned to fulfill the total quantity, or a quantity reduction occurs in the delivery

Issue Observed:

  • The system creates additional batch split lines (with quantities assigned to each batch).

  • However, the original item line remains in the outbound delivery with quantity = 0.

  • This zero-quantity line is then visible in both the delivery document and subsequent billing documents.

Why is this a problem?:

Our customers do not accept documents that show zero-quantity lines, and we cannot remove these lines from EDI delivery notes and billing documents sent to them. We use SAP's API for EDI communication and removal of lines is apparently not possible.

Example from the system:

 

 

 

Questions:

  1. Is this an expected standard SAP behavior?

  2. If so, what is the reason for keeping the zero-quantity line in the outbound delivery?

  3. Is there any configuration or workaround to prevent this from happening?

We appreciate any insights from those who have experience with batch determination and batch splits in SAP EWM.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Not Classified Error while Printing Labels in EHS Global Label Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

While printing labels for a new material in EHS GLM, the contents of the label are not being printed, rather the text "Not Classified" is shown on the print. The necessary label data is already maintained at the material master level including generation variants, label stock, etc.

Some areas of the print are fine, the screenshot is also attached.

Could someone please guide how to rectify this issue?

entry.title: SCC4 - Refresh of development system from a production copy - Error in table content (BSEG, ..)
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP experts,

We need to refresh our development system with a copy from our production system.

That's why we have launched -as usual- tCode SCC9 "Client Copy - Copy Client" in our development system.

Unfortunately, we've experienced the following issue after launching SCC9: 

* The content of some fields in standard tables after the copy in our development system is not correct, in particular, for example, fields of BSEG. 

* Here below, a sample: field "Cost Element"

Field "Cost element" (KSTAR) in BSEG register contains wrong value 64, the right value is 6420000000. But as you'll see in the screenshot above, this value has been split -after the copy from tCode SCC9- into "Cost Element", "LG-SpecClg", "PSP" and "PSP Pay Ref" fields. Really strange. 

Has anyone every experienced this issue before after running SCC9 ?

I would really appreciate your support on this matter. 

Thanks a lot in advance,

David
